description: Historical macro analogs for catalyst-driven scenario modeling. Each entry: a real precedent with realized cross-asset returns. Tags drive matching against current catalyst. Realized returns are SPY (or proxy) 1d/5d/20d % from event date close. Hand-curated, not scraped — accuracy over volume.

analogs.catalyst: Iran direct missile strike on Israel — first state-on-state attack
analogs.lesson: Pre-positioned risk-off faded fast — actual military exchange was telegraphed, market priced it in via weekend gap risk. Mean reversion within 5d.

analogs.catalyst: Iran ballistic missile barrage on Israel — second strike, larger scale
analogs.lesson: Crude was the cleanest expression. Equities chopped, bonds didn't bid as expected because oil shock = inflation = no Fed cuts.

analogs.catalyst: Russia invades Ukraine — full-scale invasion
analogs.lesson: Classic 'sell the rumor, buy the news' — market rallied on confirmation, then bled out over 20d as inflation expectations re-set. Commodities + USD were the trade.

analogs.catalyst: OPEC+ surprise voluntary production cut
analogs.lesson: Energy outperformed by 4%+, broad market shrugged. Inflation reset → bonds underperformed. XLE was the play, not SPY.

analogs.catalyst: UAE strategic OPEC review — economic-not-political framing
analogs.lesson: Policy ambiguity from a single OPEC member rarely moves crude on its own. Headline risk, not price risk.

analogs.catalyst: Fed signals end of hiking cycle — Powell 'pivot' presser
analogs.lesson: Pivots = duration trade. TLT and risk both ripped. Cleanest setup of the year.

analogs.catalyst: Fed surprise 50bp cut — first cut of cycle, dovish framing
analogs.lesson: Counterintuitive: TLT FELL because 50bp signaled growth fears, not just dovishness. Curve steepened. Gold the cleanest tell.

analogs.catalyst: Fed hawkish hold — dot plot reduces 2026 cuts to 2
analogs.lesson: Largest single-day VIX spike of 2024. Long-gamma regime got steamrolled. Lesson: gamma flips when the catalyst is binary and unhedged.

analogs.catalyst: Kevin Warsh joins Fed — hawkish reputation, family fight over cuts
analogs.lesson: Personnel changes rarely move markets day-one. Watch 2y yield for the regime read. Warsh historically hawkish — 2y up = market believes the framing.

analogs.catalyst: Hot CPI surprise — core 0.3% vs 0.2% est
analogs.lesson: Hot CPI = TLT down, SPY chop, DXY up. 5d recovery once positioning resets. Don't fade the first 24h, trade the second.

analogs.catalyst: Cool CPI surprise — core 0.2% vs 0.3% est
analogs.lesson: Cool CPI = everything-rally. Bonds + stocks + gold + crude all bid as DXY drops. 5d window is the cleanest.

analogs.catalyst: NFP blowout — 517k vs 187k est
analogs.lesson: Hot NFP = no-cuts trade. DXY surge, TLT crush, gold crush, equities chop. Cleanest expression: long DXY/short gold.

analogs.catalyst: SVB collapse — regional banking crisis triggers
analogs.lesson: Bank crisis = flight-to-quality on steroids. TLT + gold rip, crude crushed on growth fears, equities V-bottom. Fed put activated.

analogs.catalyst: Yen carry unwind — BoJ hike + weak NFP combo, VIX 65 print
analogs.lesson: Largest VIX print since covid. Fully retraced in 5d. Lesson: vol mean-reverts fast when the driver is positioning, not fundamentals.

analogs.catalyst: COVID enters US — Italy lockdown signals global spread
analogs.lesson: Once-in-a-decade tail. Don't underweight tail events in scenario trees — base rate is low but realized impact is enormous.

analogs.catalyst: Trump Liberation Day tariffs — broad reciprocal duties announced
analogs.lesson: Tariff shocks = USD DOWN (counterintuitive), gold up, equities crush, crude follows growth fears. DXY breaking 100 was the regime tell.

analogs.catalyst: Nvidia Blackwell GPU launch — GTC keynote
analogs.lesson: Mega-cap product launches in long-gamma regime = positive drift, low vol. NVDA outperformed SOXX which outperformed QQQ which outperformed SPY — clean factor cascade.

analogs.catalyst: Cerebras blockbuster IPO — NVDA competitor pricing high
analogs.lesson: Closest historical analogs: ARM IPO 9/2023 (NVDA -3% on listing day, recovered 5d), SNOW IPO 9/2020 (cloud peers chopped, recovered). AI-themed IPOs that crowd out competitor capital tend to compress sector multiples for ~5d before mean-revert.

analogs.catalyst: ARM IPO — first major chip IPO post-NVDA mania
analogs.lesson: Chip IPOs absorb sector capital. SOXX -2% 5d post-listing, NVDA -3%. Multiple compression lasted ~3 weeks before sector resumed leadership.

analogs.catalyst: Snowflake IPO — largest software IPO ever, AI hype peak
analogs.lesson: Hot IPO at sector top = top tick. SaaS peers -7% in 20d. Sentiment exhaustion was the read, not the IPO itself.

analogs.catalyst: 13F filing reveals high-profile investor stake (Ackman/Buffett pattern)
analogs.lesson: 13F is 45-day-stale. Day-of reaction is sentiment, not new info. Average 1d pop +2-4% on confirmed mega-stake, mean-reverts within 5d unless conviction stake (>3% of fund AUM).

analogs.catalyst: Putin-Xi bilateral meeting — strategic signaling
analogs.lesson: State summits without binding announcements = headline noise. Average SPY 1d move historical: -0.1%, statistically indistinguishable from zero. Watch for arms/trade pact announcements; those move oil, crude, DXY.

analogs.catalyst: Taiwan-China rhetoric escalation (verbal, not military)
analogs.lesson: Verbal escalation rarely moves SOXX more than 1%. Watch for PLA exercises or specific naval movements — those are the real signal. NVDA 1d typical -1% on Taiwan headlines, full retrace by 3d.

analogs.catalyst: HYG/LQD divergence — high yield underperforms while investment grade holds
analogs.lesson: Credit leads equity. HYG breaking 2% below 50d MA while SPY holds = equities mispriced ~3-5d ahead of catch-down. Cleanest macro tell.

analogs.catalyst: DXY breakout above 103/104 — strong dollar regime
analogs.lesson: DXY strength = headwind for mega-cap multinationals (50% intl revenue). Average 5d underperformance of QQQ vs IWM: -0.8% on DXY +1.5% moves.

analogs.catalyst: VIX/VIX3M ratio >1.0 — spot vol > 3-month vol (inversion)
analogs.lesson: Term structure inversion = institutional hedging, not retail panic. 80% historical hit rate that SPY pivots within 5 sessions of first inversion. Mean reversion trade.

analogs.catalyst: Friday OpEx with heavy 0DTE call wall + dealer long gamma
analogs.lesson: Heavy call wall + long gamma = pin within 50bps of wall in 70%+ of cases. Vol crush plays best. AVOID directional bets into the close.

analogs.catalyst: FOMC decision day — IV crush post-presser
analogs.lesson: Post-2pm SPY IV drops avg 3-5 vol points. Iron condors centered at spot 1h pre-decision = positive expectancy. Avoid directional into the print.

analogs.catalyst: Mega-cap earnings (AAPL/MSFT/NVDA/META/GOOG/AMZN) — post-print IV crush
analogs.lesson: Implied move historically overstates realized by ~15-20% on mega caps. Short premium structures (calendars, double calendars) have positive expectancy if you can hold delta. Avoid the directional bet.

analogs.catalyst: Russell rebal Friday — IWM forced flows
analogs.lesson: IWM 4pm flow event — last 15 min sees 10x avg volume. Volatility spike in small caps not large. Pair trade: short IWM straddle / long SPY straddle into the print.
